description_long: This is a tall, slender vase with a narrow neck and a flared rim, standing on a small, square black base. The body of the vase is predominantly white with visible signs of aging, including discoloration, surface pitting, and cracks. One side features a partially eroded relief, possibly depicting a human figure or classical motif, though much of the detail has been lost to time. The surface is matte and rough, with a weathered appearance that suggests it has been exposed to the elements or has significant age. The vase's form is elegant and classical, reminiscent of ancient Greco-Roman pottery. Its overall condition is worn, with visible chips and surface degradation.
description: A tall, white, weathered vase with a flared rim, square black base, and partially eroded relief decoration. The surface is rough and aged, showing cracks and chips.
description_view_0: Front view shows the most detailed relief carving, with the figure's outline and facial features partially visible.
description_view_1: This side reveals more of the vase's plain, curved surface with less visible relief and more pronounced surface wear.
description_view_2: The relief is still visible but less defined, with the figure's features more eroded and the surface showing additional cracks.
description_view_3: This view highlights the most damaged area, with heavy pitting, loss of surface material, and minimal visible decoration.
